# DATE FORMAT: DD/MM/YYYY or YYYY-MM-DD both work. Leave lease_end blank for month-to-month tenancies.
# CURRENCY: Enter rent and deposit as R 7200.00 or 7200 or 720000 (cents) — all formats are handled.
